before_code:
lemma qExpansion_eq_qExpansion_discriminant_mul (f : ModularForm 𝒮ℒ k)
    (hcusp : (qExpansion 1 f).coeff 0 = 0) :
    qExpansion 1 f = qExpansion 1 discriminant *
      qExpansion 1 (CuspForm.discriminantEquiv (toCuspForm f hcusp)) := by
  have hfun : (f : ℍ → ℂ) = discriminant *
      (CuspForm.discriminantEquiv (toCuspForm f hcusp) : ℍ → ℂ) := by
    rw [discriminant_mul_discriminantEquiv]
    rfl
  rw [hfun, ← CuspForm.coe_discriminant]
  refine UpperHalfPlane.qExpansion_mul ?_ ?_ <;>
    exact ModularFormClass.analyticAt_cuspFunction_zero _ one_pos one_mem_strictPeriods_SL
after_code:
-- First add the missing API:
protected lemma qExpansion_mul_coe {G : Type*} [FunLike G ℍ ℂ] (hh : 0 < h)
    (hΓ : h ∈ Γ.strictPeriods) {a b : ℤ} (f : F) [ModularFormClass F Γ a] (g : G)
    [ModularFormClass G Γ b] : qExpansion h ((⇑f * ⇑g : ℍ → ℂ)) = qExpansion h f * qExpansion h g :=
  qExpansion_mul (ModularFormClass.analyticAt_cuspFunction_zero f hh hΓ)
    (ModularFormClass.analyticAt_cuspFunction_zero g hh hΓ)
-- Then the target proof shrinks:
lemma qExpansion_eq_qExpansion_discriminant_mul (f : ModularForm 𝒮ℒ k)
    (hcusp : (qExpansion 1 f).coeff 0 = 0) :
    qExpansion 1 f = qExpansion 1 discriminant *
      qExpansion 1 (CuspForm.discriminantEquiv (toCuspForm f hcusp)) := by
  rw [show (⇑f : ℍ → ℂ) = discriminant * (CuspForm.discriminantEquiv (toCuspForm f hcusp) : ℍ → ℂ)
      from (discriminant_mul_discriminantEquiv _).symm, ← CuspForm.coe_discriminant]
  exact ModularForm.qExpansion_mul_coe one_pos one_mem_strictPeriods_SL _ _
description: Don't bull-through ugly proofs — extract API or find a nicer alternative. The reflex when a target proof is >3 ugly lines or needs structural massaging (cast juggling, `have ... := by ...; rfl`, sequences of arbitrary `rw` chains, manual ENat case-splits, manual typeclass machinery): STOP, identify the missing API, add it as a public lemma with `@[simp]` if applicable, then retry. Signals of missing API: `rw [show A = B from rfl]`, `have hfun := by rw ...; rfl`, `cases ha : foo.order with | top => simp | coe a => ...`, `refine X ?_ ?_ <;> exact typeclass_machinery _`, three-step round-trips through `IsCuspForm`-style wrappers. In `/cleanup` Phase 4, extend audit item 13 (MATHLIB) to flag these before finalising any proof. In `/fix-pr-feedback`, treat reviewer comments saying 'this should be an API lemma' or 'looks like more API lemmas for X' with higher priority than ordinary golf comments — grep ALL call sites of the underlying object first so the new API is named for the broader use-case. Anti-pattern: 'the proof works, just fix the cosmetic complaint and move on' — this is exactly what reviewers (MichaelStollBayreuth, loefflerd on PR #38993) keep flagging.
